metadata.description: Personal collection of GitHub Copilot CLI plugins and customizations

plugins.name: devcontainer
plugins.description: Create, update, validate, operate, and troubleshoot Dev Container setups, including `devcontainer.json`, local or published Dev Container Features, and `devcontainer` CLI workflows.

plugins.name: engineering-workflow
plugins.description: Workflow agents for prompt distillation, technical design analysis, implementation, and contributor-facing documentation.

plugins.name: synouser
plugins.description: Synology utilities for managing local users and groups with synouser and synogroup.

plugins.name: ugacltool
plugins.description: UGREEN NAS ACL utility for editing file and directory permissions with ugacltool.
